name: Bär Cargolift
message: [AI generated] Bär Cargolift is a leading European manufacturer of hydraulic tail lifts, often utilized in trucks and commercial vehicles. Founded in 1981 in Heilbronn, Germany, it provides a wide range of products, from standard liftgates to retractable lifts, designed for different vehicle types and load capacities. Bär Cargolift is recognized for its innovation, quality, and safety in producing transport solutions. They also offer value-added services like training, repair, and maintenance.
